claim.hypotheses.explanation: Reference states a specific testable hypothesis about downstream investments contingent on prior shares; extracted marks it as not stated.

claim.hypotheses_location.explanation: Reference pinpoints Conjecture 2 (p. 550); extracted says not stated.

claim.statement.explanation: Reference provides a clear statement about an interaction effect with a reported coefficient; extracted says not stated.

claim.statement_location.explanation: Reference locates the claim in Table 8 (5-person model); extracted says not stated.

claim.study_type.explanation: Both identify the study as Experimental.

data.source.explanation: Reference marks source as NA; extracted provides a laboratory experiment description rather than indicating NA.

data.wave_or_subset.explanation: Reference marks wave/subset as NA; extracted lists treatment/group details instead of indicating NA.

data.sample_size.explanation: Reference reports N = 270; extracted says not stated.

data.unit_of_analysis.explanation: Both indicate individual participants’ decisions per round (nested within groups).

data.access_details.explanation: Reference describes supplementary material access; extracted says not stated.

data.notes.explanation: Extracted captures nested structure and key design elements, but omits reference-specific details about practice rounds and exact grouping (6 groups).

method.description.explanation: Largely consistent with the reference (asymmetric commons, investment and extraction, communication, HLM). Extracted includes extra treatment (interruptions) and omits some specific timing/details.

method.steps.explanation: Covers recruitment, tokens, phases, treatments, rounds, and modeling. Missing rules quiz and practice rounds from the reference, and adds extra analyses.

method.models.explanation: Both indicate hierarchical linear models were used (HLM).

method.outcome_variable.explanation: Reference focuses on investment levels as the DV; extracted includes that but adds multiple additional outcomes.

method.independent_variables.explanation: Extracted lists position, round, and prior share, but omits the key interaction term (position × prior share) central to the claim and adds unrelated variables.

method.control_variables.explanation: Reference is not stated; extracted proposes controls (group effects, dummies, trends) instead of indicating not stated.

method.tools_software.explanation: Reference specifies Stata 10.0 (xtmixed); extracted says not stated.

results.summary.explanation: Extracted provides general findings about asymmetry, cooperation, and determinants; it does not report the specific significant positive interaction effect for downstream investments central to the reference.

results.numerical_results[0].outcome_nam.explanation: Reference reports coefficient for the interaction effect on investments; extracted reports cooperative equilibrium maximum earnings (2-player), a different outcome.

results.numerical_results[0].value.explanation: Reference value is 3.836; extracted reports 38 tokens.

results.numerical_results[0].unit.explanation: Reference unit is NA; extracted uses tokens.

results.numerical_results[0].statistical.explanation: Reference indicates significance; extracted marks false.

results.numerical_results[1].outcome_nam.explanation: Outcome does not match the reference (reports 5-player cooperative maximum vs. interaction coefficient).

results.numerical_results[1].value.explanation: Reference value is 3.836; extracted reports 104 tokens.

results.numerical_results[1].unit.explanation: Reference unit is NA; extracted uses tokens.

results.numerical_results[1].statistical.explanation: Reference indicates significance; extracted marks false.

results.numerical_results[2].outcome_nam.explanation: Outcome pertains to Gini coefficient, unrelated to the reference’s reported interaction effect.

results.numerical_results[2].unit.explanation: Reference unit NA; extracted leaves blank.

results.numerical_results[2].statistical.explanation: Reference indicates significance; extracted marks false.

results.numerical_results[2].direction.explanation: Reference effect is positive; extracted marks null.

results.numerical_results[3].outcome_nam.explanation: Outcome pertains to Gini coefficient, not the interaction effect on investments.

results.numerical_results[3].unit.explanation: Reference unit NA; extracted leaves blank.

results.numerical_results[3].statistical.explanation: Reference indicates significance; extracted marks false.

results.numerical_results[3].direction.explanation: Reference effect is positive; extracted marks null.

results.numerical_results[4].outcome_nam.explanation: Outcome is starting tokens per round, not the reported interaction effect.

results.numerical_results[4].unit.explanation: Reference unit NA; extracted uses tokens.

results.numerical_results[4].statistical.explanation: Reference indicates significance; extracted marks false.

results.numerical_results[4].direction.explanation: Reference direction is positive; extracted marks null.

results.numerical_results[5].outcome_nam.explanation: Outcome is token monetary value, not the interaction effect.

results.numerical_results[5].unit.explanation: Reference unit NA; extracted uses USD per token.

results.numerical_results[5].statistical.explanation: Reference indicates significance; extracted marks false.

results.numerical_results[5].direction.explanation: Reference direction is positive; extracted marks null.

metadata.original_paper_id.explanation: Reference DOI is 10.1007/s10683-011-9281-9; extracted says not stated.

metadata.original_paper_title.explanation: Reference title is provided; extracted says not stated.
